name: Feature request
about: Something worth building. Check the roadmap first.
title: "[feature] "

<!-- Before opening: skim docs/roadmap.md. If what you want is already queued, comment on that issue/discussion instead. -->

### Problem

<!-- What's the friction? How are you working around it today? -->

### Proposal

<!-- What should weft do? Be concrete. "Make it better" isn't a proposal. -->

### Alternatives considered

<!-- At least one. Forces you to pick the best option, not just the first. -->

### How it fits

<!-- One of:
     - Solidly in-scope (bug / missing feature / doc)
     - Needs discussion (new dep, permission change, bigger UI surface)
     - Speculative (happy to be wrong)
